body:
## Problem

The `/guides` index page is in the sitemap at priority 0.9 (`api/sitemap.js:412`) but `api/meta/[...path].js` has **no handler for `path === '/guides'`**.

Individual guide pages have handlers:
- `/guides/how-to-sound-like-<slug>` → line 256
- `/guides/<slug>` → line 271

But the hub index `/guides` falls through to the generic SPA fallback.

## Fix

Add to `api/meta/[...path].js` before the soundLikeMatch handler (around line 255):

```javascript
// /guides hub index
if (path === '/guides') {
  return {
    title: `Metal Drumming Guides — Sound Like the Legends & Beginner Tutorials | ${SITE_NAME}`,
    description: 'Step-by-step guides to sound like your favourite metal drummers. Covers kit setup, tuning, technique, and gear selection for beginners and pros.',
    image: `${BASE_URL}/images/og/techniques-preview.png`,
    type: 'website',
    url: `${BASE_URL}/guides`,
    articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
      '@context': 'https://schema.org',
      '@type': 'CollectionPage',
      name: 'Metal Drumming Guides',
      description: 'How-to guides and tutorials for metal drummers, covering technique, gear setup, and sound recreation',
      url: `${BASE_URL}/guides`,
      publisher: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge', url: BASE_URL },
    }),
    breadcrumbSchema: [
      { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
      { name: 'Drumming Guides', url: `${BASE_URL}/guides` },
    ],
  };
}
```

## Files to Touch

- `api/meta/[...path].js` — add `path === '/guides'` handler before line 256

## Quality Gate

- `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta/guides | jq '.title'` → keyword-matched title
- `jq '.articleSchema'` → CollectionPage JSON-LD
- Title ≤ 60 chars

## Estimated Uplift

Targets "metal drumming guides" + "how to sound like [drummer]" parent-category queries. Pairs with individual guide pages that already have SSR meta.

## Done

- [ ] `/guides` hub returns keyword-matched SSR title
- [ ] CollectionPage JSON-LD present in SSR response
title: SEO: /guides hub page missing SSR meta + CollectionPage schema — serves generic fallback
